text.title: Agent Shape Decision Frame Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: Single-turn single-agent with human-gate before mutating call.
Single-turn single-agent. Smallest shape; no ceremony.

branch.when: turn_count == multi AND needs_multi_agent == true AND eval_available == true

conclusion.verdict: Multi-agent. Tool count or domain split justifies it; eval gate exists.

branch.when: turn_count == multi AND needs_multi_agent == true AND eval_available == false

conclusion.verdict: Escalate — multi-agent without evals fails in production.

branch.when: turn_count == multi AND needs_multi_agent == false AND deployment_surface == hosted-only

conclusion.verdict: Use Claude Code headless. Cheaper, battle-tested.

branch.when: turn_count == multi AND needs_multi_agent == false AND deployment_surface == custom

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
